zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud verch Ieuan於大約1329年出生在威爾士拉德諾斯爾布盧德時，她的父親Ieuan ap Rhys31歲，母親Gwladys ferch Dafydd21歲。她於1345年與Llewelyn ap Hywel在英國威爾斯布雷康史爾布雷可諾可結婚。他們至少是18個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1424年12月在她的家鄉享年96歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maud verch Ieuan于大约1329年出生在威尔士拉德諾斯爾布盧德时，她的父亲Ieuan ap Rhys31岁，母亲Gwladys ferch Dafydd21岁。她于1345年与Llewelyn ap Hywel在英国威尔斯布雷康史爾布雷可諾可结婚。他们至少是18个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1424年12月在她的家乡享年96岁。

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Ieuan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: John
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Maud verch Ieuan was born about 1329, in Boughrood, Radnorshire, Wales, her father, Ieuan ap Rhys, was 31 and her mother, Gwladys ferch Dafydd, was 21. She married Llewelyn ap Hywel in 1345, in Brecknock, Breconshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 18 sons and 8 daughters. She died in December 1424, in her hometown, at the age of 96.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud verch Ieuan est née environ 1329, à Boughrood, Radnorshire, Galles, son père, Ieuan ap Rhys, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Gwladys ferch Dafydd, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Llewelyn ap Hywel en 1345, à Brecknock, Breconshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 18 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée en décembre 1424, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 96 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maud verch Ieuan um 1329 in Boughrood, Radnorshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ieuan ap Rhys 31 und ihre Mutter Gwladys ferch Dafydd 21. Sie hat 1345 in Brecknock, Breconshire, Wales, United Kingdom Llewelyn ap Hywel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 18 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb im Dezember 1424 im Alter von 96 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maud verch Ieuan è nata il circa 1329 nel Boughrood, Radnorshire, Galles, sua padre, Ieuan ap Rhys, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Gwladys ferch Dafydd, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Llewelyn ap Hywel nel 1345, nel Brecknock, Breconshire, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 18 figli e 8 figlie. Morì nel dicembre 1424, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 96 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Maud verch Ieuanが約1329年にウェールズラドノーシュアイアボウルーッドで生まれた時，父Ieuan ap Rhysは31歳，母Gwladys ferch Dafyddは21歳であった。1345年にイギリスウェールズブレコンシュアイアブレクノックでLlewelyn ap Hywelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも18人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1424年12月に故郷で96歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Maud verch Ieuan(이)가 대략 1329년 웨일스 라드노르실르 부그h루드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ieuan ap Rhys(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gwladys ferch Dafydd(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1345년 영국 웨일스 브레콘실르 브레c노크에서 Llewelyn ap Hywel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1424년 12월 그녀의 고향에서 96세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.Lngtwgdyfrynwysg, Abergavennym, Monmouth: Llangattocknigh Usk, Monmouthshire, Gales, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maud verch Ieuan nasceu aproximadamente 1329, em Boughrood, Radnorshire, Gales, seu pai, Ieuan ap Rhys, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Gwladys ferch Dafydd, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Llewelyn ap Hywel em 1345, em Brecknock, Breconshire, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 18 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu em dezembro de 1424, em sua cidade natal, com 96 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud verch Ieuan родилась около 1329 г. в местности боугруд, радноршир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Ieuan ap Rhys было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Gwladys ferch Dafydd, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Llewelyn ap Hywel в 1345 г. в местности бреккнокк, брекуншир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 18 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Она умерла декабрь 1424 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 96 лет.

es.Lngtwgdyfrynwysg, Abergavennym, Monmouth: Llangattocknigh Usk, Monmouthshire, Gales, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maud verch Ieuan nació aproximadamente 1329, en Boughrood, Radnorshire, Gales, su papá, Ieuan ap Rhys, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Gwladys ferch Dafydd, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Llewelyn ap Hywel en 1345, en Brecknock, Breconshire, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 18 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió en diciembre de 1424, en su pueblo, a la edad de 96 años.
